description: Daily mini-apps built by Ada for Amber

apps.title: Creative Product Pricer
apps.oneLiner: Price your creative work with confidence across originals, prints, licensing, and workshops — calculate value-based rates using materials, time, experience, and market positioning.

apps.title: Context Window Visualizer
apps.oneLiner: Paste any text and see how many tokens it uses across GPT-4, Claude, and Gemini — understand context limits visually and plan your prompts smarter.

apps.title: Dinner Decision Spinner
apps.oneLiner: A playful spinning wheel to pick what's for dinner when the family can't decide — add options, tap to spin, get dramatic results with sound and flair.

apps.title: Decision Log
apps.oneLiner: Track key decisions with context, reasoning, and outcomes — see patterns over time and build your decision-making muscle.

apps.title: Workshop Pricing Calculator
apps.oneLiner: Price your workshops with confidence — calculate break-even, competitive, and premium tiers based on your time, materials, and desired income.

apps.title: How AI Actually Works
apps.oneLiner: A 30-minute interactive class for middle schoolers — fill-in-the-blank game, jargon-busting vocab, AI lie detector, and a real LLM running in the browser.

apps.title: Portfolio Builder
apps.oneLiner: Shared CMS for Amber Miro's portfolio system — 12 pieces, 9 documents, 19 tasks, all sync'd via Telegram.

apps.title: Family Jeopardy!
apps.oneLiner: Mobile Jeopardy board for the family — 47 categories, 705 questions, fresh 5×5 board every round.

apps.title: Prompt Sharpener
apps.oneLiner: Paste any AI prompt and get instant critique + rewrite — learn what makes prompts sharp vs sloppy, with before/after examples.

apps.title: Magic Decision Maker
apps.oneLiner: Mystical toy for trivial decisions — ask a question, shake your phone, get delightfully dramatic guidance with personality.

apps.title: Revenue Pulse
apps.oneLiner: Visual progress meter toward your $25K/year Amber Miro Creative goal — set monthly targets, log earnings, watch the bar grow.
